_meta.purpose: Offline capability manifest — lets the agent explain what's possible when the server is unreachable
_meta.note: This is NOT a capsule. It's a capability description for graceful degradation.

expression_creation.description: Create, resolve, and manage brand expression systems from keywords, descriptions, or visual references

runtime_design_system.description: Serve live design tokens, push overrides, evolve the system, resolve design conflicts

brand_governance.description: Compile capsules, run quality gates, publish/rollback versions, validate accessibility and evidence

coding_agent_support.description: Lint generated code against brand rules, compile content with brand voice, validate output

visual_expression.description: Create brand-aligned carousels, posters, slides, and production HTML via Prism

ecosystem_status.description: Overview of brands, capsules, tier, and capabilities

offline_message: The expression infrastructure server is not reachable. This agent requires a live connection to mcp.designless.studio to create, resolve, and govern brands. Check your API key (LESS_API_KEY) and network connection. Get a free key at build.designless.studio.
